title: Savory Silky Light Thai Fideo Stir-fry
description: This egg-free-friendly dish features a savory and silky texture made with fideo noodles and fermented vegetables for a light and healthy meal.

ingredients.name: 1/4 tsp fish sauce (or soy sauce for non-Asian), optional

instructions: Boil the fideo noodles according to package instructions until al dente.
Meanwhile, mix together turmeric powder and optional fish sauce in a small bowl for seasoning.
Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for 30 seconds.
Add the chopped fermented vegetables to the pan with their liquid, then pour in the noodle water used during boiling. Simmer for about 2 minutes.
Stir in the turmeric powder mixture. If using fish sauce, add it now and stir well.
Gradually fold in the boiled fideo noodles, ensuring they are evenly coated with the sauce and vegetables. Stir-fry for another minute until everything is combined and heated through.
Serve hot as a light lunch or dinner side dish.
